author: Mark
title: 🚨 BREAKING: J.P. Crawford Returns - Starting DH vs White Sox TODAY (12:10 PM)
content:
MARINERS FANS - THIS IS HUGE!

J.P. Crawford is BACK in today's lineup as the designated hitter vs Chicago White Sox. First appearance since the opening exhibition game.

## Why This Changes Everything:

**OPENING DAY IMPLICATIONS:** This is the test we've all been waiting for. How does Crawford look after the layoff? Is he ready for March 27th?

**TODAY'S STORYLINES:**
⚾ Crawford's return - rust or ready?
⚾ Bryan Woo's second start of spring
⚾ White Sox have solid pitching - real test
⚾ 12:10 PM PST start - LESS THAN 30 MINUTES AWAY

## Community Predictions - GET YOURS IN NOW:

**CRAWFORD WATCH:**
- Will he drive in a run today?
- Over/under 2.5 at-bats?
- Does he look comfortable or rusty?

**WOO WATCH:**
- How many innings does Bryan pitch?
- Velocity check - is the stuff still there?
- Command better than start #1?

**GAME OUTCOME:**
- Mariners win or lose?
- Final score predictions?
- Who's the star of the game?

## MY BOLD TAKE:
Crawford goes 2-for-3 with an RBI double. Woo pitches 4 strong innings. Mariners win 7-4 in a slugfest that gets us all hyped for the real season.

**WHAT'S YOUR PREDICTION?**

Drop your takes below - let's see who knows this team best! Winner gets bragging rights and a shoutout in my post-game analysis.

**GAME STARTS AT 12:10 PM PST - GET TO YOUR TV/RADIO/STREAM!**

This is what spring training is all about, TridentFans. Real games, real stakes, real hope.

**LET'S GO MARINERS!** 🔱

-Mark
